import "std/array"
import "std/int"

func solve(grid: Array<Array<Int64>>, x: Int64, y: Int64, k: Int64): Array<Array<Int64>> {
    let m = grid.length()
    let n = if m > 0 then grid[0].length() else 0
    let new_grid = grid.clone()
    let start_row = x
    let end_row = x + k - 1
    let start_col = y
    let end_col = y + k - 1

    var i = start_row
    var j = end_row
    while i < j {
        var col = start_col
        while col <= end_col {
            let temp = new_grid[i][col]
            new_grid[i][col] = new_grid[j][col]
            new_grid[j][col] = temp
            col = col + 1
        }
        i = i + 1
        j = j - 1
    }

    return new_grid
}

import "std/array"

func solve(grid: Array<Array<Int64>>, x: Int64, y: Int64, k: Int64): Array<Array<Int64>> {
    let m = grid.length()
    let n = if m > 0 then grid[0].length() else 0
    let result = grid.clone()
    
    for i in 0..k {
        let row = x + i
        if row >= m then break
        for j in 0..k {
            let col = y + j
            if col >= n then break
            let mirrored_row = x + k - 1 - i
            if mirrored_row < m then
                result[row][col] = grid[mirrored_row][col]
            end
        end
    end
    
    return result
end
